/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/ingestion_core.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/ingestion_core.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ingestion_core.dir/src/zmq_client.cpp.o -o ingestion_core   -L/lib/intel64  -L/lib/intel64_win  -L/lib/win-x64  -Wl,-rpath,/lib/intel64:/lib/intel64_win:/lib/win-x64:/opt/libtorch/libtorch/lib:/opt/cuda/lib /opt/libtorch/libtorch/lib/libtorch.so /opt/libtorch/libtorch/lib/libc10.so /opt/libtorch/libtorch/lib/libkineto.a /opt/cuda/lib/libnvrtc.so /opt/libtorch/libtorch/lib/libc10_cuda.so -lzmq /usr/lib/libcrypto.so -Wl,--no-as-needed,"/opt/libtorch/libtorch/lib/libtorch_cpu.so" -Wl,--as-needed -Wl,--no-as-needed,"/opt/libtorch/libtorch/lib/libtorch_cuda.so" -Wl,--as-needed /opt/libtorch/libtorch/lib/libc10_cuda.so /opt/libtorch/libtorch/lib/libc10.so /opt/cuda/lib/libcudart.so -Wl,--no-as-needed,"/opt/libtorch/libtorch/lib/libtorch.so" -Wl,--as-needed
